name: @3k/shared
description: Shared types + card/general content re-exports for client and server. Resolved by package name (not a relative ../../ reach) so consumers with a restrictive rootDir (server/tsconfig.json) don't break — see docs/engine-design.md §8.

scripts.test: echo "no tests in shared — see server/test/content.test.ts" && exit 0
